post.description: Exchanges a Riot authorization code and returns a Firebase custom token plus user data.
post.summary: Exchange RSO code for Firebase custom token

post.description: Schedules cancellation at period end for the authenticated user's active subscription.
Creates a Stripe checkout session for a monthly or yearly plan.

get.description: Returns Stripe-backed monthly and yearly pricing details.

post.description: Removes a scheduled cancellation from the authenticated user's active subscription.
Accepts a pending stack invite for the authenticated user and schedules cancellation of any personal Stripe subscription.
Declines a specific pending stack invite for the authenticated user.
Invites a user by Firebase UID to join the authenticated stack owner's plan.

delete.description: Leaves the stack that the authenticated user currently belongs to.

get.description: Returns pending and active stack members for the authenticated stack context. Stack owners and active stack members can view the roster.

delete.description: Removes a member invite or active member from the authenticated stack owner's stack.

get.description: Returns the pending stack invites for the authenticated user.

post.description: Validates and processes Stripe subscription-related webhook events.

get.description: Lists folders for the authenticated user.

post.description: Creates a folder for the authenticated user.

delete.description: Deletes a folder owned by the authenticated user.

patch.description: Updates folder name or parent for the authenticated user.

get.description: Streams an image by key using backend credentials.

post.description: Accepts a multipart/form-data payload with a single "image" field.
Creates a new lobby initialized with default map and empty phases.

get.description: Retrieves lobby and full canvas phases by lobby code.

patch.description: Updates lobby canvas state by lobby code.

get.description: Lists strategies for the authenticated user, optionally filtered by folderId.

post.description: Saves a lobby as a strategy for the authenticated user.

delete.description: Deletes a strategy owned by the authenticated user.

patch.description: Updates strategy name and/or folder assignment.

post.description: Creates a user profile linked to the authenticated Firebase UID.

put.description: Updates profile fields for the authenticated user.

delete.description: Deletes the authenticated user from the application and Firebase.

patch.description: Internal endpoint to update a user's subscription status by userId or firebaseUid.

memberEmail.description: Populated via JOIN when listing members

BearerAuth.description: Firebase bearer token in the form "Bearer <token>".
BearerAuth.name: Authorization
